title: hieracium subvulgatum
intro: Hieracium subvulgatum, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, is also known as the common hawkweed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the liver and gallbladder. The health benefits of Hieracium subvulgatum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its herbal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
